title: Privacy Policy
description: Privacy Policy for Nexora digital marketing services

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We may collect business details such as name, contact number, email, address, social media handles, and marketing-related performance data for service optimization.

sections.title: 2. How We Use the Information
sections.content: Collected information is used solely for improving online visibility, running local marketing campaigns, performance tracking, and business growth optimization.

sections.title: 3. Data Protection & Security
sections.content: We implement secure handling of login access, confidential storage of business data, and restricted access to authorized team members only.

sections.title: 4. Third-Party Platforms
sections.content: We may use trusted platforms such as Google, Meta (Facebook & Instagram), analytics tools, and hosting providers. These platforms have their own privacy policies and data handling practices.

sections.title: 5. Client Data Safety
sections.content: Client login credentials and data will remain confidential. Ownership of all digital assets will always remain with the client, and access can be revoked anytime upon request.

sections.title: 6. Consent & Communication
sections.content: By using our services, the client agrees to communication via WhatsApp, Email, or Phone for project updates, reports, and strategy discussions.

sections.title: 7. Policy Updates
sections.content: We reserve the right to update this Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy document for service improvements and legal compliance. Clients will be informed in case of major changes.

sections.title: Final Note
sections.content: Our goal is to build long-term trust and growth partnerships with local businesses rather than short-term gains. This document ensures transparency, professionalism, and mutual understanding between both parties.
